question.question_text: How many total points will be scored in the NBA game between LA Clippers and Indiana Pacers on 2026-03-27?
question.context: LA Clippers (37-36) at Indiana Pacers (16-57). Regular season NBA game.

prediction.reasoning: The point estimate is derived by assessing team offensive and defensive strengths based on their season records relative to a projected league average total of 230 points. The LA Clippers (37-36) are estimated to have slightly above-average offense and defense. The Indiana Pacers (16-57) are estimated to have below-average offense and significantly below-average defense. This results in an expected Clippers score of ~127 and Pacers score of ~107, totaling 234 points. Confidence intervals are calculated using a standard deviation of 11 points for NBA game totals around the point estimate.
